samples.name: momabobasheep-vowel
samples.desc: Five sustained vowel shapes for the sleep-mix harmony bed: oo, oh, ah, eh, mm (closed hum). One vowel per take. Sing each as ONE steady tone in a comfortable LOW chest voice and hold it 4-5 seconds, soft and even like a lullaby drone — no vibrato push, no scooping, just a calm straight tone that fades out naturally. The exact pitch does not matter and can differ per take; it gets pitch-analyzed and tuned onto the chord tones afterward.
